tool_args.label: Staff Summary - MTA 2020-2024 Capital Program Amendment
tool_args.raw_text: Subject MTA 2020-2024 Capital Program Amendment

payload.title: Staff Summary
payload.description: Staff Summary for MTA Board approval of the proposed amendment to the MTA 2020-2024 Capital Program, increasing total funding to $55.442 billion

evidence_refs.source_quote: Metropolitan Transportation Authority
Staff Summary
Date July 27, 2022
To obtain MTA Board approval of the proposed amendment to the MTA 2020-2024 Capital Program that increases the total funding to $55.442 billion

tool_args.label: MTA 2020-2024 Capital Program Amendment #2
tool_args.raw_text: Proposed MTA 2020-2024 Capital Program Amendment (Amendment #2). This amendment increases the current capital program by $108 million from $55.334 billion to $55.442 billion.

payload.description: Amendment #2 to the MTA 2020-2024 Capital Program, increasing total funding to $55.442 billion

evidence_refs.source_quote: Proposed MTA 2020-2024 Capital Program Amendment (Amendment #2). This amendment increases the current capital program by $108 million from $55.334 billion to $55.442 billion.

tool_args.label: Penn Station Access
tool_args.raw_text: The design-build contract was awarded in December 2021 and an amendment to the capital program (Amendment #1) was approved by the Board and CPRB to address the $921 million initial budgetary needs at award.

payload.description: MTA Expansion project to bring Metro-North service to Penn Station; design-build awarded Dec 2021; $385M added for New Rochelle Yard and $312M for initial fleet acquisition

evidence_refs.source_quote: Penn Station Access. The design-build contract was awarded in December 2021 and an amendment to the capital program (Amendment #1) was approved by the Board and CPRB to address the $921 million initial budgetary needs at award.

tool_args.label: Penn Reconstruction
tool_args.raw_text: The State of New York is advancing a new project to address the reconstruction of Penn Station. In this amendment there is a new project to support the general engineering contract award which is anticipated to be awarded in the Fall of 2022.

payload.description: State of New York project for reconstruction of Penn Station; new project for general engineering contract anticipated Fall 2022

evidence_refs.source_quote: Penn Reconstruction. The State of New York is advancing a new project to address the reconstruction of Penn Station.
